description: Maps nginx personas to exposed version signals and example CVEs scanners may associate (containers are mimics, not vulnerable installs).

generic.fingerprint_summary: Static login pages, honeytrap ModSecurity rules on WAF.
generic.notes: No CMS version claim; generic web lure.

wordpress.fingerprint_summary: Headers X-Generator WordPress 5.8.1, meta generator, /wp-login.php, /readme.html Version 5.8.1, xmlrpc.php stub.
wordpress.cve_notes: CVE-2022-21661 affects WordPress before 5.8.3; 5.8.1 is in the affected range for scanner templates that key on version.

drupal.fingerprint_summary: X-Generator Drupal 7, /CHANGELOG.txt line Drupal 7.92 / SA-CORE-2022-003, /user/login, install.php stub.
drupal.cve_notes: CVE-2022-25271 is SA-CORE-2022-003 (Drupal 7 before 7.88); 7.92 mimics a patched line in CHANGELOG. CVE-2018-7600 is classic Drupal 7 remote-code class; scans still target Drupal 7 paths.

moodle.cve_notes: CVE-2020-14321: Moodle 3.9.x before 3.9.4; 3.9.3 is in the affected range for version-based probes.

cas.fingerprint_summary: /cas/login form, WWW-Authenticate hint, typical campus SSO paths.
cas.cve_notes: Lure for SSO path scanning; pair with app-specific CVEs when you pin a CAS product version in HTML.
